name: Oven-Baked Wheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Buttermilk (or sour milk or orange juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter two large baking sheets and place them in the oven.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients. Do not overmix; the batter should be lumpy.
4. Pour pancake batter onto the hot baking sheets.
5. Bake for 10 minutes without flipping the pancakes.
